message:
fix(core): harden proposal validation paths, file ref quoting, and tree selection arithmetic

Three targeted correctness fixes:

- extensions_js: validate_proposal now checks monotonicity for ALL paths
  in a PatchOp, not just the target — ReplaceModulePath.from was
  unchecked, allowing a non-monotonic source path to bypass the safety
  gate. Also resolves relative paths against extension_root before
  verification instead of only checking absolute paths, closing a gap
  where relative paths were passed directly to verify_repair_monotonicity
  without proper resolution.

- interactive/file_refs: format_file_ref now also quotes paths that end
  with trailing punctuation (via is_trailing_punct), preventing shell
  and parser misinterpretation of file references like "@path/to/file."
  or "@config/test?" where the trailing character could be consumed as
  syntax by downstream consumers.

- interactive/tree: replace wrapping addition (self.selected + delta)
  with saturating_add to match the existing saturating_sub pattern on the
  negative branch, preventing potential overflow on extremely large delta
  values before the .min(max_index) clamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
